transcript: Speaker A: vo interviewer English me goli barsata raha aur me plastic ki toy gun leke sirf khada raha. [That interviewer kept firing bullets of English, and I just stood there with a plastic toy gun.] Samajh to sab aata tha mujhe par English bolte wakt mera wifi disconnect ho jata tha. [I understood everything, but while speaking English, my wifi would disconnect.] fir mere Friend ne bola ki SpeakX app download kar. [Then my friend told me to download the SpeakX app.] yaha ki AI teacher hume english bolne ki practice karati hai. [The AI teacher here makes us practice speaking English.] Galti turant correct and wo bhi without any Judgement. [Mistakes are corrected instantly, and that too without any judgment.] Maza bhi aata hai Games, Quizes, full timepass learning. [It's also fun with games, quizzes, full timepass learning.] to roz sirf 15 min ab interviewer mujhse jobhi puchega me use English me ekdum tagda jawab dunga. [So just 15 minutes daily, and now whatever the interviewer asks me, I will give a strong reply in English.] Plastic gun se upgrade ho jao and download SpeakX app. [Upgrade from a plastic gun and download the SpeakX app.]
on_screen_text:
vo interviewer English me goli barsata raha [That interviewer kept firing bullets of English]
aur me plastic ki toy gun leke sirf khada raha [and I just stood there with a plastic toy gun]
Samajh to sab aata tha mujhe [I understood everything]
par English bolte wakt [but while speaking English]
mera wifi disconnect ho jaata tha [my wifi would disconnect]
fir mere Friend ne bola [then my friend said]
SpeakX.ai
yaha ki AI teacher hume english bolne ki practice [the AI teacher here makes us practice speaking English]
karati hai [does]
Galti turant correct [Mistakes corrected instantly]
and wo bhi without any Judgement [and that too without any judgment]
Maza bhi aata hai Games, Quizes, full timepass hai [It's also fun, games, quizzes, full timepass]
to roz sirf 15 min [so just 15 mins daily]
ab interviewer mujhse jobhi puchega [now whatever the interviewer asks me]
me use English me ekdum tagda jawab dunga [I will give a strong reply in English]
Plastic gun se upgrade ho jao and download [Upgrade from a plastic gun and download]
SpeakX.ai
summary: A young man shares his struggle of freezing during English interviews despite understanding the language. He introduces the SpeakX app, highlighting its AI-driven speaking practice, instant judgment-free corrections, and engaging games. He concludes by urging viewers to practice 15 minutes daily and download the app to boost their confidence.
